allow: Bash(node -e "const t = require\(''./out/webview/cwTheme''\); const js = t.cwInteractiveJs\(\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(js\).slice\(0, 200\)\); const non = [...js].filter\(c => c.charCodeAt\(0\) > 127\); console.log\(''Non-ASCII chars:'', non.map\(c => ''U+'' + c.charCodeAt\(0\).toString\(16\).toUpperCase\(\) + ''\('' + c + ''\)''\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const t = require\(''''./out/webview/cwTheme''''\); const js = t.cwInteractiveJs\(\); const non = [...js].filter\(c => c.charCodeAt\(0\) > 127\); console.log\(''''Non-ASCII in cwInteractiveJs:'''', non.map\(c => ''''U+'''' + c.charCodeAt\(0\).toString\(16\).toUpperCase\(\) + ''''\('''' + c + ''''\)''''\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const t = require\(''./out/src/webview/cwTheme''\); const js = t.cwInteractiveJs\(\); const non = [...js].filter\(c => c.charCodeAt\(0\) > 127\); console.log\(''Non-ASCII in cwInteractiveJs:'', non.map\(c => ''U+'' + c.charCodeAt\(0\).toString\(16\).toUpperCase\(\) + '' \('' + c + ''\)''\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const t = require\(''./out/src/webview/cwTheme''\); const js = t.cwInteractiveJs\(\); const non = [...new Set\([...js].filter\(c => c.charCodeAt\(0\) > 127\).map\(c => ''U+'' + c.charCodeAt\(0\).toString\(16\).toUpperCase\(\) + '' \('' + c + ''\)''\)\)]; console.log\(''Unique non-ASCII:'', non\);")

Bash(node -e "const t = require\(''./out/src/webview/cwTheme''\); [''cwThemeCss'',''syntaxHighlighterCss'',''syntaxHighlighterJs'',''cwInteractiveJs''].forEach\(fn => { const s = t[fn]\(\); const non = [...new Set\([...s].filter\(c => c.charCodeAt\(0\) > 127\).map\(c => ''U+'' + c.charCodeAt\(0\).toString\(16\).padStart\(4,''0''\).toUpperCase\(\)\)\)]; console.log\(fn + '':'', non.join\('', ''\)\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\(''''fs''''\).readFileSync\(''''/dev/stdin'''',''''utf8''''\); const p=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\(''''main:'''', p.main\); console.log\(''''scripts:'''', JSON.stringify\(p.scripts,null,2\)\);")
